recommendations.title: Weapons
recommendations.overview: When all but one child from the same class mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

recommendations.title: Destiny
recommendations.overview: Bekir loves Uğur, who loves Zagor, who is about to get out of jail. An already tense love triangle is thrown into turmoil on a hot summer night, when Zagor kills someone, and Uğur disappears.

recommendations.title: The Night Listener
recommendations.overview: In the midst of his crumbling relationship, a radio show host begins speaking to his biggest fan—a young boy—via the telephone. But when questions about the boy's identity come up, the host's life is thrown into chaos.

recommendations.title: Along Came the Devil
recommendations.overview: After a troubled childhood, Ashley searches for a connection, and unknowingly invites in a demonic force, which leaves her loved ones fighting for her soul.

recommendations.title: The Room
recommendations.overview: Kate and Matt discover that a part of their house can grant wishes. In the wake of two miscarriages, what they want most is a child.

recommendations.title: Pumpkinhead: Ashes to Ashes
recommendations.overview: He threw their loved ones into a swamp. Now they want revenge... But when a demon does their dirty work, it comes at a price.

recommendations.title: Birth/Rebirth
recommendations.overview: A single mother and a childless morgue technician are bound together by their relationship to a little girl they have reanimated from the dead.

recommendations.title: The Den
recommendations.overview: A young woman studying the habits of webcam chat users from the apparent safety of her apartment witnesses a brutal murder online and is quickly immersed in a nightmare in which she and her loved ones are targeted for the same grisly fate as the firs

recommendations.title: Pulse
recommendations.overview: When the dead discover a means to contact the living through electronic devices, cellphones and computers become open gateways to monstrosities and destruction.

recommendations.title: 13 Minutes
